title: Redis Command
description: Schema for a Redis command descriptor as returned by the COMMAND INFO command.

name.description: Command name in lowercase (e.g., get, set, hset).

arity.description: Command arity: number of required arguments. Negative arity means minimum argument count (e.g., -2 means at least 1 arg after command name).

flags.description: Command flags indicating behavior (e.g., write, readonly, denyoom, admin).

first_key.description: Index of first key in argument list.

last_key.description: Index of last key in argument list. -1 means last argument.

step.description: Step between keys in argument list.

acl_categories.description: ACL categories the command belongs to.

complexity.description: Time complexity annotation (e.g., O(1), O(N), O(log N)).
